# CWE-1204 vulnerable: static AES-CBC initialization vector
lang: go
file: CWE-1204-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1204: Generation of Weak Initialization Vector (IV).
// Vulnerable: cipher.NewCBCEncrypter reuses fixed iv bytes for every request.

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"encoding/base64"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var weakIV = []byte("1234567890123456")

func EncryptField(key []byte) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		plain := c.PostForm("value")
		block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		mode := cipher.NewCBCEncrypter(block, weakIV)
		padded := pkcs7Pad([]byte(plain), block.BlockSize())
		out := make([]byte, len(padded))
		mode.CryptBlocks(out, padded)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ciphertext": base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)})
	}
}

func pkcs7Pad(data []byte, blockSize int) []byte {
	pad := blockSize - len(data)%blockSize
	padding := make([]byte, pad)
	for i := range padding {
		padding[i] = byte(pad)
	}
	return append(data, padding...)
}
